case_title: PATEL, N. R. vs. DEBERRY, ELLIS et al

docket_entries.description: APPLICATION FOR WAIVER OF 985.(I) CRC COURT FEES AND COSTS FILED BY DEFENDANT DEBERRY, ELLIS ORDER GRANTING WAIVER OF 985.(I) CRC COURT FEES AND COSTS

THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT DEBERRY, ELLIS THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: 106 6TH ST, #316 SAN FRANCISCO, CA. 94103 $1,018.22 RENT, $80.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $1,098.22, STAYED UNTIL FEB-03-1995, LEASE FORFEITED, PLT WILL WAIVE ALL BACK RENTS & DAMAGES IF DEFT VACATES BY 5PM ON 2-3-95. EACH PARTY WAIVES ALL CLAIMS. EACH SIDE BEARS OWN COSTS & ATTY FEES. NO FURTHER STAY.
